memberdef.name: LED_MAX_BLINK
memberdef.initializer: 0x1 /* Number of times the LED Blinks */

memberdef.name: GPIO_BITWIDTH
memberdef.initializer: 16 /* This is the width of the GPIO */

briefdescription.para: This function does a minimal test on the GPIO device configured as OUTPUT and driver as a example.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the GPIO driver Instance
contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function performs a test on the GPIO driver/device with the GPIO configured as INPUT.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device
is the pointer where the data read from GPIO Input is returned

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the Test is successful
XST_FAILURE if the test is not successful

simplesect.para: In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the example.

detaileddescription.para: This function is not included if the example is generated from the Peripheral Tests in SDK.

briefdescription.para: This file contains a example for using AXI GPIO hardware and driver.

detaileddescription.para: This example assumes that there is a UART Device or STDIO Device in the hardware system.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a sv 04/15/05 Initial release for TestApp integration. 3.00a sv 11/21/09 Updated to use HAL Processor APIs. 3.01a bss 04/18/13 Removed incorrect Documentation lines.(CR #701641) 4.1 lks 11/18/15 Updated to use canonical xparameters and clean up of the comments and code for CR 900381 4.3 ms 01/23/17 Added xil_printf statement in main function to ensure that "Successfully ran" and "Failed" strings are available in all examples. This is a fix for CR-965028. 4.10 gm 07/11/23 Added SDT support. 4.10 gm 08/28/23 Update example to support peripheral tests. 4.13 vlt 12/17/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details.
